'''dazhava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:osmiamate|osmiamate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-zh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:osmiamate|osmiamate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dazhava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæzhævæth|dæzhævæth]] || [[word:dæzhævæj|dæzhævæj]] || [[word:dæzhævæsh|dæzhævæsh]] || [[word:dæzhævæ|dæzhævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dazhazhavath|dazhazhavath]] || [[word:dazhazhavaj|dazhazhavaj]] || [[word:dazhazhavash|dazhazhavash]] || [[word:dazhazhava|dazhazhava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dazhavath|dazhavath]] || [[word:dazhavaj|dazhavaj]] || [[word:dazhavash|dazhavash]] || [[word:dazhava|dazhava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dazhafvath|dazhafvath]] || [[word:dazhafvaj|dazhafvaj]] || [[word:dazhafvash|dazhafvash]] || [[word:dazhafvaf|dazhafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dazhavatha|dazhavatha]] || [[word:dazhavaja|dazhavaja]] || [[word:dazhavasha|dazhavasha]] || [[word:dazhavaka|dazhavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dazhavath|dazhavath]] || [[word:dazhavaj|dazhavaj]] || [[word:dazhavash|dazhavash]] || [[word:dazhava|dazhava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dazhavathal|dazhavathal]] || [[word:dazhavajal|dazhavajal]] || [[word:dazhavashal|dazhavashal]] || [[word:dazhavakal|dazhavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dazhavathatha|dazhavathatha]] || [[word:dazhavajaja|dazhavajaja]] || [[word:dazhavashasha|dazhavashasha]] || [[word:dazhavaka|dazhavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dazhavathan|dazhavathan]] || [[word:dazhavajan|dazhavajan]] || [[word:dazhavashan|dazhavashan]] || [[word:dazhavakan|dazhavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dazhavathaoro|dazhavathaoro]] || [[word:dazhavajaoro|dazhavajaoro]] || [[word:dazhavashaoro|dazhavashaoro]] || [[word:dazhavakaoro|dazhavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
